title: calculation.sage.completed data
description: Data payload for the calculation.sage.completed event. Models SageCalcOutput from activitycontracts: includes traceability fields (sageJobId, durationMs) alongside result access.

jobId.description: UUIDv7 job identifier; also the Temporal workflow ID.

tenantKey.description: Tenant identifier of the submitting organization.

calcType.description: Calculator type. Always 'sage' for this event.

calcName.description: Optional human-readable calculation name supplied at submission.

completedAt.description: UTC timestamp when the job completed.

durationMs.description: Wall-clock duration of the calculation activity as observed by the worker, in milliseconds.

outputUrl.description: URL to download the sage-api ModuleCalculationResult JSON result. May be a signed short-lived URL.

sageJobId.description: Upstream sage-api CalculationJobResult GUID, captured for traceability. Empty when the worker used the synchronous endpoint.
